title: Triage 3 indicators through gate + statcheck
context: After the pilot, the project needs a pipeline of triaged indicators ready for brief-authoring tasks. Triage means applying the full gate-004 (licence/provenance/PII/sensitivity) and statcheck-003 (statistical integrity, flag handling, chronic-vs-acute distinction) to each candidate indicator from TOPIC-CATALOG.md before any dataset or brief work begins. Committed PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifacts for three indicators unblock brief-011 and brief-012.
objective: Apply the gate-004 and statcheck-003 review to three candidate indicators from TOPIC-CATALOG.md and produce committed PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifacts with full rationale for each.
acceptanceCriteria: Three candidate indicators evaluated; for each, a committed gate artifact (PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE) with rationale, covering: third-party-data check, PII screen, sensitivity screen, licence id/URL/snapshot, permitsDerivatives: true with cited clause, attribution + non-endorsement.

Each PASS artifact includes a statistical-suitability note: how status flags are handled, reference period type, whether uncertainty is published and preserved, and confirmation the indicator is structural/long-run rather than acute-crisis.
Any acute-crisis, advice-adjacent, or non-clean-licence indicator is explicitly EXCLUDED or escalated with the concern surfaced and documented.
At least two indicators reach PASS status and are ready to proceed to brief-011 and brief-012.
Artifacts committed to the repo (e.g. review/<indicator-id>-gate.md or equivalent); commit is DCO signed-off.
resources: FAOSTAT terms of use (CC BY 4.0 IGO)
output: Three committed gate artifacts (PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE) for three candidate FAOSTAT indicators, with at least two ready to proceed to brief-authoring.
